testcase.name: test_upload_image_file
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration19_features.py:297: in test_upload_image_file assert response.status_code == 200, f"Upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Upload failed: {"detail":"Token non valido"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing token in login response: {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI4ZmNiOGVlNC1hNmJhLTQ4NWQtYmM2My1lYmI1NWY3MTFkYzIiLCJleHAiOjE3NzQxODY2MTcsImlhdCI6MTc3NDEwMDIxN30.d4ByzIhtLnQEObPvC7n5GNcUL893JIF1oeFqEJ5U6SE', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'id': '8fcb8ee4-a6ba-485d-bc63-ebb55f711dc2', 'email': 'admin@brunomelito.it', 'name': 'Bruno Melito', 'salon_name': 'Bruno Melito Hair', 'created_at': '2026-03-05T16:06:01.117819+00:00'}} assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI4ZmNiOGVlNC1hNmJhLTQ4NWQtYmM2My1lYmI1NWY3MTFkYzIiLCJleHAiOjE3NzQxODY2MTcsImlhdCI6MTc3NDEwMDIxN30.d4ByzIhtLnQEObPvC7n5GNcUL893JIF1oeFqEJ5U6SE', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'created_at': '2026-03-05T16:06:01.117819+00:00', 'email': 'admin@brunomelito.it', 'id': '8fcb8ee4-a6ba-485d-bc63-ebb55f711dc2', 'name': 'Bruno Melito', ...}}
